abstract: Creates an object that acts as a container for a set of connected transforms.
overview:
## Return Value

A transform group object.

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecGroupTransform] is a container for all of the transforms that are in a directed graph. You can use this container as you would a single transform with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecute(_:_:)], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecuteAsync(_:_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCopyExternalRepresentation(_:)] functions.On the other hand, unlike a stand alone transform, you can’t use a transform group with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformConnectTransforms(_:_:_:_:_:_:)], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformSetAttribute(_:_:_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformGetAttribute(_:_:)] functions. Attempting to do so produces undefined behavior.

# SecTransformCreateGroupTransform()

**Function**

Creates an object that acts as a container for a set of connected transforms.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecTransformCreateGroupTransform() -> SecGroupTransform
```

## Return Value

A transform group object.

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecGroupTransform] is a container for all of the transforms that are in a directed graph. You can use this container as you would a single transform with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecute(_:_:)], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformExecuteAsync(_:_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformCopyExternalRepresentation(_:)] functions.On the other hand, unlike a stand alone transform, you can’t use a transform group with the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformConnectTransforms(_:_:_:_:_:_:)], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformSetAttribute(_:_:_:_:)] or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecTransformGetAttribute(_:_:)] functions. Attempting to do so produces undefined behavior.
